jd_text: Overview The Business Director role is responsible for both building client relationships and managing a team, while collaborating with senior leadership ( Business Lead / CEO), other agency departments (creative, strategy, production) and other potential partners from Publicis Group (media, Vertical, epsilon, sapient) This candidate will lead the strategic, operational and delivery aspects of major accounts and own relationships with Saatchi & Saatchi Wellness. client(s). They will work closely with the Business Lead of your account(s) and ultimately ensuring high levels of client satisfaction and revenue growth across your assigned client portfolio. The Business Director will take responsibility & accountability for the growth of their team and client business, identifying and developing opportunities to drive new business proposals involving the group capabilities. Foster the agency’s beliefs and spirit externally-internally, as well as develop and drive vision for the business, aiming to bring in more business and drive the Power of One development and implementation. As part of their day-to-day office leadership team, the candidate will work to inspire, mentor, and guide the career development of your team members Responsibilities Lead client conversations and work closely with Business Lead(s) to ensure excellence in strategy, creative and production. Oversee strategy, planning, creative execution, production for all assigned client accounts. Responsible for winning client commitment to the agency and Group’s direction, strategy, recommendations, and subsequent execution, translating business needs to creative challenges and ensuring a timely delivery milestone. Perceived as a trusted advisor by your own clients and as an expert in specific industry, internally and in the market, by demonstrating deep understanding and knowledge of category. Be able to define the correct scope, the needed resources and deliver accordingly to financial targets for the current year. Support in business development reports alongside other senior agency stakeholders and engage relevant group resources when appropriate. Qualifications 10 years experience with a track record in creative, brand, digital, social and data-driven marketing projects in creative agencies, with a strong focus on healthcare communication. Experience in being client facing in a leading role Management experience of 3-5 subordinates Excellent understanding of end-to-end communication eco-system, with a deep understanding of the health industry , communications trends, and latest trends in data and marketing integration. Experience in planning, strategy, managing and activating multichannel campaigns. BA degree (or similar) Additional Information R3844 P4365
